title: festuca cinerea var. robusta
intro: Festuca cinerea var. robusta, also known as robust grey fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for wound healing, reducing inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The health benefits of robust grey fescue include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its essential oil is used topically to promote skin health and reduce stress.
